title: Planning Backed Broad Issue Ingestion
goal: Add an operational guardrail so broad issue-ingestion requests route through active planning before implementation.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Current broad issue-ingestion request must be routed through checked-in planning before implementation; source #424.
intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to #424 and the implementer-context command path; preserve direct execution for narrow single-issue work.
intent.latitude: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and continue with #425 or the next selected open lane.
execution.proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "implement_task or implement_command"; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace implement --task "ingest and implement all open GitHub issues" --format json; uv run agentic-workspace implement --task "implement issue #424" --format json

invariants: Broad external-work ingestion must not proceed from issue text alone when no active planning record exists.
Narrow single-issue task text must remain usable without mandatory broad planning.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Broad issue ingestion and implementation should use checked-in planning as execution authority, while issue trackers remain intake sources.

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make broad issue-ingestion requests harder to execute outside the package workflow.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep scope bounded to #424 and the implementer-context command path; preserve narrow single-issue work.

immediate_next_action: Add --task routing to implementer context, validate broad-vs-narrow issue behavior, then archive this slice.
invariants: Broad external-work ingestion must not proceed from issue text alone when no active planning record exists.
Narrow single-issue task text must remain usable without mandatory broad planning.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "implement_task or implement_command"
uv run agentic-workspace implement --task "ingest and implement all open GitHub issues" --format json
uv run agentic-workspace implement --task "implement issue #424" --format json
completion_criteria: A compact package command returns a machine-readable needs-planning route for broad issue ingestion without blocking narrow single-issue work.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: The implementer context command accepts task text and routes broad external issue ingestion through active planning, returning needs-planning when no active planning record exists while preserving narrow single-issue execution.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run ruff check src tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #425 remains in the broad issue-ingestion process guardrail lane.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archived execplan plus tests and command contract updates.
execution_summary.resume from: Promote #425 or the next selected open lane from .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run ruff check src tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
proof_report.proof achieved now: Broad issue-ingestion task text is classified in implementer context and cannot silently look like ordinary direct work when no active plan exists.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Focused tests cover broad no-active-plan and narrow single-issue behavior; dogfood command output showed needs-planning on a temp target with no active plan and planning-backed on this active repo.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #424 asked for a compact command path that blocks or routes broad issue ingestion when no active planning record exists while preserving narrow direct work; implement --task now supplies that route.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: workspace CLI tests, contract tooling check, generated command package check, ruff, maintainer surfaces, planning doctor, summary, reconcile, and dogfood implement command outputs passed
closure_check.reopen trigger: A broad open-issues ingestion request can again proceed from compact package context without a needs-planning or active planning-backed signal.
